sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 14:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 14:1
items.html: From the vessels of straightness, and they themselves, cannot draw light from Ein Sof since there are no screen and coarseness in them. (Part Two, Chapter One, Inner light, Item 30)
